subject: [DCAE] Top up components version
commit_message:
[DCAE] Top up components version

- dcae-hv-ves-collector to 1.8.0
  update all HV-VES dependencies to newest versions

Change-Id: I0044bad7f012d0e0125afbe9c7b0f64a6fe325f4
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2696
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Pietruszkiewicz <tomasz.pietruszkiewicz@nokia.com>

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 17 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Hi Toine,
same question here: are you sure we need this one in H release?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

1.8.0 hv-ves introduces  enhancement for supporting stddefined routing -  this feature was targetted for Istabul release hence honolulu update not required at this point of release cadence
